results.title: Alvian Networks Establishes US Operations in Buffalo, New York, Reinforcing Cross-Border Commitment to Critical Infrastructure Security
results.description: HAMILTON, ON and BUFFALO, N.Y., June 22, 2026 /PRNewswire/ - Alvian Networks today announced the formal establishment of Alvian USA Inc., its wholly owned US subsidiary, with operations based at 1 Seneca Street, 29th Floor, Buffalo, New York 14203.
